summary:
Training completed in 47.7 hours (85 epochs).
Best performance achieved at epoch 85.

Key Metrics:
- mAP@50: 0.9304 (mean average precision at 50% IoU)
- mAP@50-95: 0.6923 (mAP across all IoU thresholds)
- Precision: 0.9131 (accuracy of positive predictions)
- Recall: 0.9101 (completeness of detections)

Final Loss: 0.9658
strengths: ✅ Excellent precision: mAP@50-95 = 0.6923 indicates strong overall detection accuracy
✅ High recall: 0.9101 - model captures most objects in images
✅ High precision: 0.9131 - low false positive rate
recommendations: ✨ Model shows good fit! Monitor validation metrics in future runs.
